_doc: C4 memory closed-loop trust gate. Shared by the Node forge codegen path (memory_trust_gate.js) and the Python RAG path (memory_trust.py). A retrieved memory is UNTRUSTED DATA; it may enter a prompt only if its trust score clears min_trust AND it passes injection-pattern detection. Both implementations fall back to these baked-in defaults if the file is missing/partial, so the gate never crashes on config problems. No secrets, model names, or prompt text live here.

corroboration._doc: usage_count saturates to full weight at this many reuses (log-scaled). 0 reuses = no corroboration credit.

provenance._doc: Credit for where the memory came from. A memory with a real source run is trusted more than one with unknown origin.

recency._doc: Optional age decay for the Python RAG path (memories carry timestamps). half_life_days = age at which recency credit halves. Set enabled=false to ignore age.
